transcript.text:
Hi there! I will be your virtual assistant today. I can assist you in English or French. Which language would you prefer to use today?

Bonjour! Je serai votre assistante virtuelle aujourd'hui. Je peux vous aider en français ou en anglais. Quelle langue préférez-vous utiliser aujourd'hui ?
§W§OPTIONS§English • Français
English
How can I help you today?

transcript.note: Opening the claim request for my delayed flight
transcript.text: Hi, I'd like to file a claim for compensation. My flight was delayed and I believe I'm entitled to compensation.
Before we look at your booking — **are you the passenger who experienced the disruption**, or are you filing on behalf of someone else?
§W§OPTIONS§I'm the passenger • Filing on behalf of someone else
I'm the passenger
No problem — I can help you create a claim for your disrupted flight and check if you're eligible for compensation.

§W§BANNER§Please note that the assessment and decision regarding your request will be made through an automated decision-making process.

To file your claim, you'll need your booking reference, the name associated to the booking and any receipts you'd like to be reimbursed for. If your claim is eligible, you may also need to provide your address, contact information and where you'd like the funds deposited.
Would you like to get started?
§W§OPTIONS§Yes, let's go • Not right now
Yes, let's go
To get started, I'll need a little information to identify you. Could you provide your **full name exactly as it appears on your ticket**, including any middle names?

transcript.note: Providing my full name as it appears on the ticket
transcript.text: Elias Stellenmark
Thanks, **Elias**! Could you also provide your **booking reference number**? It's a 6-character code made up of letters and/or numbers, found in your booking confirmation email.
ELK85M

Just to confirm:
- **First name:** Elias
- **Last name:** Stellenmark
- **Booking reference:** ELK85M

Is that all correct?
Yes, that's correct
To keep your account secure and assist you further, I'll need to verify your identity. I'll send a one-time verification code to your email on file (l*****@a*****.com). Shall I go ahead?
§W§OPTIONS§Yes • No
Yes
I've sent a verification code to your email, please enter it within 15 minutes of receiving it. If you haven't received a code, please wait 1 minute before requesting a new one.
§W§BANNER§Your identity has been verified.
Can you confirm that this is the trip you're claiming for?
§W§FLIGHT§YUL → YYZ · Thu, Jul 16 · AC8002 · 08:00→11:00 · nonstop
§W§OPTIONS§Yes • No
Yes
§W§OPTIONS§Canada • United States • Other
Canada

We require a 72-hour waiting period after the aircraft's arrival before we can finalize your eligibility review. Once the review is complete, we'll contact you by email with the outcome.

Before we close this conversation, please confirm if you'd like to receive this update at **l\*\*\*\*\*@a\*\*\*\*\*.com**.
§W§OPTIONS§Yes, use this email • Use a different email
Yes, use this email
§W§BANNER§Your case has been submitted for agent review.
An agent will follow up with you by email with the next steps.
Is there anything else I can help you with?

transcript.note: The assistant has indicated the case is submitted for agent review and will follow up by email - this is a clear outcome (handed to agent). Ending conversation politely.
transcript.text: No, that's all. Thank you for your help!
§W§INFO§FEEDBACK

checks.actual: Not explicitly displayed but case submitted for agent review with 72-hour waiting period
checks.name: System Code

verdict.reasoning: The chatbot successfully processed the claim and reached a determination of PENDING status, which matches the expected outcome. The bot explicitly stated "We require a 72-hour waiting period after the aircraft's arrival before we can finalize your eligibility review" and "Your case has been submitted for agent review." This aligns with the expected PENDING decision and system code FD-APPR-PE-01. No compensation amount was quoted (n/a), which also matches expectations. All key identifiers (PNR ELK85M, passenger name Elias Stellenmark) were correctly captured.
